name: pips-playground
description: Pip's Playground — a cozy learning web game for 3 year olds (colors, shapes, numbers, animals, ABC, words, patterns).

scripts.cap:add:ios: npm run build:web && npx cap add ios
scripts.cap:add:android: npm run build:web && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:web && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build:web && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
